title: ホープフルSの後に・火花散る

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... Holy smokes! That racer's so tiny, but
she's good!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
No kidding! It was incredible the way she caught
up with the others! What was her name again?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin does amazing in the challenging
G1 race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Already, the public's opinion of her is changing
for the better!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sure, but this isn't enough for me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: My next race is the real deal.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
The Satsuki Sho is the first part of the Triple
Crown tour, and I'm gonna be the one to win it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin's fighting spirit burns brightly as we
head down the path of the Satsuki Sho!
